但是有一个缺点，就是看的时候会高兴开心的笑出来，但是看完了之后，会有很强烈的戒断反应，看完之后没有心情干任何事情了，刷视频，打游戏，吃饭都感觉没意思了，感觉快抑郁了[哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746868804,"group_id":"7402949132521835544","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4uSECp911X4LfN0X6dHokw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ae1fc9dd8e164bf5a0e57979eee5a2f5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532180&x-signature=SpiZPT%2B4mAv2LxIaepif%2Byw1EYg%3D","user_id":"79882378950","user_name":"爱吃睿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"79882378950","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7402949132521835544","book_info":{"abstract":"【日常轻松】+【互换身体】+【无系统】+【不重生】+【小甜文】
墨青川，一个临近高考的学生，本以一切会按部就班的到大学，没想到一觉醒来居然和第一校花互换了身体。
自此，他就开始顶着从无绯闻的校花身体上学。
随着时间推移，越来越多人发现校花和墨青川走的非常近，于是绯闻四起。
“什么情况？墨青川不是在追于苗苗吗？”
“你确定，不声不响的和第一校花走这么近，我好羡慕！”
“不能让墨青川得手，我要表白！”
“我靠！他俩怎么牵手了！？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7ff95d9113f8de2c367e9bf720431010","author":"米浴","author_id":"","book_id":"7402949132521835544","book_name":"我堂堂男子汉变成富婆校花？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#98c0d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":831,"name":"灵魂互换","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=831&name=灵魂互换&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7402955500767167000","read_count":"12201","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"603041"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"281","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,校花,单女主,搞笑轻松,灵魂互换","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/50e38012c6610ea51b6fd5624952123b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182692&x-signature=XSXlq4mSHgvneEb4lXabk3EQmGA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4424904636106203","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"414"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320172451019F16C7E1D2772AC211"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读49小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"l 忽略一些小瑕疵 可以说是完美 但是跳过了暑假 这个准备确立关系的暑假应该是很有激情的 然后大学篇我大概看到一半了吧 中间也没有插叙过那段时间的故事 大多数都是为了填坑插叙一段 然后大学篇前期为了介绍一些新环境用了很多文字铺垫也没问题 但是重复的日常太多了感觉很乏味 看到这里就没有最开始看到停不下来的那种精彩了 感觉应该侧重写两个人互换身体对对方和对旁人接触时不同的感受 暂时就看到这里
